CAPTCHA_REQUIRED: Please complete the captcha and try again.
CAPTCHA_INVALID: Captcha verification failed. Please try again.
PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 12 characters.
PASSWORD_BREACHED: This password has appeared in a known data breach. Please choose a different one.
NO_GUILD_MEMBERSHIP: No guild membership. Join or create a guild to continue.
CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_ROLE: Cannot change your own guild role
CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot demote the last guild admin
NOT_GUILD_MEMBER: Not a member of this guild
CANNOT_LEAVE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot leave guild: you are the last admin. Promote another user to admin first.
CANNOT_LEAVE_SOLE_PM: Cannot leave guild: you are the sole project manager. Promote another member first.
CANNOT_LEAVE_OWNS_PROJECTS: Cannot leave guild: you still own projects in it. Pick a new owner for each before leaving.
CANNOT_REMOVE_OWNS_PROJECTS: Cannot remove member: they still own projects in this guild. Pick a new owner for each before removing them.
PROJECT_TRANSFER_RECIPIENT_INVALID: Project transfer target isn't a valid active member.
INVITE_EXPIRED_OR_USED: Invite has expired or has already been used
initiative_NOT_A_MEMBER: Not a member of this Mythforge
initiative_CANNOT_MODIFY_PM_PERMISSIONS: Project Manager permissions cannot be modified
initiative_CANNOT_CHANGE_BUILTIN_MANAGER: Cannot change manager status for built-in roles
initiative_MUST_HAVE_MANAGER: At least one manager role with members must remain
initiative_USER_NOT_IN_GUILD: User is not part of this guild
initiative_MUST_HAVE_PM: Mythforge must have at least one project manager
initiative_ROLE_HAS_MEMBERS: Cannot delete role: members are still assigned to it
PROJECT_NO_ACCESS: You don't have access to this project
PROJECT_GRANT_CANNOT_MANAGE_MEMBERS: Temporary access can't manage project members
PROJECT_PIN_PERMISSION_REQUIRED: Only guild admins and Mythforge managers can pin projects
PROJECT_DOCUMENT_WRONG_initiative: Document belongs to a different Mythforge
PROJECT_CANNOT_ASSIGN_OWNER_TO_ROLE: Cannot assign owner permission to a role
PROJECT_ROLE_WRONG_initiative: Role must belong to the project's Mythforge
TASK_ALREADY_IN_PROJECT: Task already belongs to this project
TASK_CANNOT_MOVE_TO_TEMPLATE: Cannot move task to a template project
TASK_PROJECT_MISMATCH: Task does not belong to this project
TASK_STATUS_NOT_FOUND_FOR_PROJECT: Task status not found for this project
TASK_ASSIGNEES_NOT_FOUND: One or more assignees not found
TASK_TAGS_NOT_FOUND: One or more tags not found
SUBTASK_NOT_FOUND_FOR_TASK: Subtask not found for this task
TASK_STATUS_CANNOT_REMOVE_LAST: Cannot remove the final status for this category
TASK_STATUS_FALLBACK_REQUIRED: A fallback status is required when tasks exist
TASK_STATUS_FALLBACK_MUST_DIFFER: Fallback status must be different from the deleted status
TASK_STATUS_FALLBACK_CATEGORY_MISMATCH: Fallback status must share the same category
TAG_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A tag with this name already exists
PROPERTY_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A property with this name already exists
PROPERTY_TYPE_CHANGE_BLOCKED: Cannot change property type while values exist. Remove attached values first.
PROPERTY_INVALID_VALUE_FOR_TYPE: Value does not match the property's type
PROPERTY_OPTION_NOT_IN_DEFINITION: Selected option is not valid for this property
PROPERTY_USER_NOT_IN_initiative: Referenced user is not a member of this Mythforge
PROPERTY_NOT_initiative_MEMBER: You need to be a member of this Mythforge to manage its properties
PROPERTY_OPTIONS_REQUIRED: Select and multi-select properties require at least one option
PROPERTY_DUPLICATE_OPTION_VALUE: Option values must be unique within a property
DOCUMENT_NO_ACCESS: You don't have access to this document
DOCUMENT_TITLE_ALREADY_EXISTS: A document with this title already exists in this Mythforge
DOCUMENT_USER_MUST_BE_MEMBER: User must be an Mythforge member
DOCUMENT_CANNOT_ASSIGN_OWNER_TO_ROLE: Cannot assign owner permission to a role
DOCUMENT_ROLE_WRONG_initiative: Role must belong to the document's Mythforge
DOCUMENT_AI_NATIVE_ONLY: AI summarization is only available for native documents
DOCUMENT_SMART_LINK_URL_REQUIRED: A URL is required for smart-link documents
DOCUMENT_SMART_LINK_URL_INVALID: Smart-link URLs must start with http:// or https://
DOCUMENT_SPREADSHEET_INVALID_PAYLOAD: The spreadsheet content is invalid or in an unsupported format.
DOCUMENT_INVALID_TAG_IDS: One or more tag IDs are invalid
DOCUMENT_NOT_A_FILE_DOCUMENT: Only uploaded file documents support versions
DOCUMENT_CANNOT_DELETE_LAST_VERSION: Can't delete the only version — delete the document instead
DOCUMENT_VERSION_TYPE_MISMATCH: A new version must be the same file type as the original
DOCUMENT_VERSION_CONFLICT: Someone uploaded a version at the same time. Please try again.
DOCUMENT_INVALID_FILE: Unsupported or invalid file. Supported: PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, TXT, HTML, images, Markdown (max 50 MB).
COMMENT_PARENT_MISMATCH: Parent comment belongs to a different entity
COMMENT_PROVIDE_ONE_ENTITY: Provide exactly one of task or document
COMMENT_AUTHOR_ONLY_EDIT: Only the comment author can edit
COMMENT_AUTHOR_ONLY_DELETE: You can only delete your own comments
COMMENT_NOT_LINKED: Comment is not linked to a task or document
SETTINGS_initiative_ID_REQUIRED: Mythforge ID required for Mythforge mappings
SETTINGS_initiative_ROLE_ID_REQUIRED: Mythforge role ID required for Mythforge mappings
SETTINGS_initiative_WRONG_GUILD: Mythforge does not belong to the specified guild
SETTINGS_initiative_FIELDS_REQUIRED: Mythforge ID and Mythforge role ID required for Mythforge mappings
ADMIN_CANNOT_RESET_INACTIVE: Cannot reset password for inactive user
ADMIN_CANNOT_CHANGE_OWN_ROLE: Cannot change your own platform role
ADMIN_CANNOT_CHANGE_ROLE_INACTIVE: Cannot change platform role of a deactivated or anonymized account
ADMIN_CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot demote the last platform admin
ADMIN_USE_SELF_DELETION: Use the account settings page to delete your own account
ADMIN_CANNOT_DELETE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot delete the last platform admin
ADMIN_CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: Cannot delete your own account through admin endpoint
ADMIN_PROJECT_TRANSFERS_REQUIRED: Project transfers required for hard delete when user owns projects
ADMIN_CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_GUILD_ADMIN: Cannot demote the last guild admin
ADMIN_CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_PM: Cannot demote the last project manager
USER_CANNOT_DELETE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot delete the last platform admin account
USER_CONFIRMATION_MISMATCH: Confirmation text must be 'DELETE MY ACCOUNT'
USER_PROJECT_TRANSFERS_REQUIRED: You must specify transfer recipients for all owned projects
USER_MISSING_PROJECT_TRANSFERS: Missing transfer recipients for some projects
USER_INVALID_WEEK_START: Week start must be between 0 (Sunday) and 6 (Saturday)
USER_PLATFORM_ROLE_WRONG_ENDPOINT: Platform role changes must use the admin endpoint
USER_CANNOT_REMOVE_LAST_ADMIN: Cannot remove the last platform admin
USER_CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own account
USER_NOT_IN_GUILD: User not part of this guild
QUEUE_WRITE_ACCESS_REQUIRED: Write access required for this queue
QUEUE_INVALID_TAG_IDS: One or more tag IDs are invalid
QUEUES_NOT_ENABLED: Queues are not enabled for this Mythforge
COUNTER_initiative_NOT_FOUND: Mythforge not found for this counter group
COUNTER_PERMISSION_REQUIRED: Permission required for this counter group
COUNTER_CREATE_PERMISSION_REQUIRED: Permission required to create counter groups
COUNTER_WRITE_ACCESS_REQUIRED: Write access required for this counter group
COUNTERS_NOT_ENABLED: Counters are not enabled for this Mythforge
COUNTER_VIEW_MODE_REQUIRES_BOUNDS: Progress bar and segmented clock require both min and max to be set
COUNTER_MIN_GREATER_THAN_MAX: Minimum cannot be greater than maximum
COUNTER_STEP_MUST_BE_POSITIVE: Step must be a positive number
COUNTER_OUT_OF_RANGE: Value is outside the allowed range
RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
TRASH_ITEM_NOT_FOUND: That trashed item is no longer available.
TRASH_NEEDS_REASSIGNMENT: Pick a new owner before restoring.
TRASH_PURGE_REQUIRES_ADMIN: Only guild admins can permanently delete items.
PROJECT_EXPORT_SCHEMA_VERSION_UNSUPPORTE: This project export was created by a newer version of Mythforge and can't be imported here.
PROJECT_EXPORT_INVALID_PAYLOAD: The project export file is invalid or corrupted.
PROJECT_EXPORT_NO_TASK_STATUSES: The project export has no task statuses, which is required for import.
ADVANCED_TOOL_NOT_CONFIGURED: The advanced tool is not configured for this deployment.
ADVANCED_TOOL_NOT_ENABLED: The advanced tool is not enabled for this Mythforge.
AI_INVALID_BASE_URL: Base URL is not allowed. Use a public hostname.
AI_PROVIDER_NOT_ALLOWED: Ollama can only be configured at the platform level.
fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ACCESS_GRANT_DURATION_TOO_LONG: Requested duration exceeds the maximum allowed.
ACCESS_GRANT_ALREADY_MEMBER: You're already a member of that guild.
ACCESS_GRANT_OVERLAPPING: You already have an open or active request for that guild.
ACCESS_GRANT_NOT_PENDING: This request is no longer pending.
ACCESS_GRANT_CANNOT_APPROVE_OWN: You can't approve your own request.
ACCESS_GRANT_CANNOT_CANCEL_OTHERS: You can only cancel your own request.
ADMIN_CANNOT_ASSIGN_HIGHER_ROLE: You can't assign a role higher than your own.
ADMIN_CANNOT_DEMOTE_LAST_OWNER: Cannot demote the last platform owner.
ADMIN_CANNOT_DELETE_LAST_OWNER: Cannot delete the last platform owner.
DOCUMENT_GRANT_CANNOT_MANAGE_MEMBERS: Temporary access can't manage document members
COUNTER_GRANT_CANNOT_MANAGE: Temporary access can't manage counter group access
NATIVE_OTA_BUNDLE_NOT_AVAILABLE: This server build has no over-the-air update bundle available
